query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE 'SEED-%') as total_seed_claims,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE 'SEED-%' AND damage_photos IS NOT NULL AND damage_photos != '[]') as seed_claims_with_photos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id IN (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE 'SEED-%')) as ai_assessments_created;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE 'SEED-%') as total_seed_claims,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE 'SEED-%' AND damage_photos IS NOT NULL AND damage_photos != '[]') as seed_claims_with_photos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id IN (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE 'SEED-%')) as ai_assessments_created;
